source_pr.title: tests: add tests for concurrent cursor fetch
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #54801

Problem Summary:

I left a comment to add tests for concurrent cursor fetch.

### What changed and how does it work?

 In this PR, I added these tests to enrich the case about running normal statements while there is a cursor in the background at the same time.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: rawStmt, err := conn.Prepare("select * from t1 order by id") (pkg/server/tests/cursor/cursor_test.go)
failure_signature: rawStmt, err := conn.Prepare("select * from t1 order by id") (pkg/server/tests/cursor/cursor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
